professional_summary: AI Engineer and Technical Lead with experience in multi-agent orchestration systems, full-stack development, and community leadership. Proven track right in designing state-driven engines and modular agent services. Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science at Deakin University.

responsibilities: Collaborated with Product Owner and senior engineering consultant to define requirements for a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system
Designed and implemented a state-driven orchestration engine to coordinate 16 specialised agents
Ensured deterministic execution and eliminated race conditions in multi-step LLM workflows
Built modular agent services with JSON-based state contracts and execution guards
Optimised research pipeline performance by integrating Tavily API, reducing token usage by 60%
Implemented parallel execution across 5 agents in the assembly phase
Developed validation and quality assurance mechanisms for LLM outputs
achievements: Reduced token usage by 60% through retrieval-based research approach
Improved system throughput through concurrent processing and server-side aggregation

responsibilities: Delivered structured programming instruction across multiple Melbourne schools
Taught JavaScript, C, Java, and Python to groups of 12–20 students
Provided hands-on debugging and problem-solving support

awards.title: Intergenerational Conversations Youth Conference Success
awards.body: Facilitated structured dialogue achieving 50+ attendees and 4.5/5 satisfaction rating
